ddls:
CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the awarding agency */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the award */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the awarding agency */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the award (e.g., university, district, international) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the award was received */,
  "nomination_date" TEXT /* Date when the award was nominated */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the award was approved */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the award is currently active */,
  "award_image" TEXT /* URL or path to an image of the award */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the awarding agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of the agency (e.g., university, NGO, government) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agency (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the agency's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the agency */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the agency is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the recipient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the recipient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient's department */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient's user role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the recipient is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipients_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipients_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the department is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the user role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user role is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)
column_names: Level of the award (e.g., university, district, international)
Date when the award was nominated
Date when the award was approved
Flag to indicate if the award is currently active
URL or path to an image of the award
Additional notes or comments about the award

Contact information for the agency (e.g., email, phone)
Flag to indicate if the agency is currently active
Reference to the recipient's user role
Flag to indicate if the recipient is currently active

Flag to indicate if the category is currently active
Flag to indicate if the department is currently active
